findings.description: The note that the actual implementation for parsing OS and browser info from User-Agent is provided only as a **sample** (サンプル) is not captured anywhere in the knowledge file. Users relying on the knowledge file would incorrectly assume a built-in production implementation exists for extracting OS/browser details.
findings.source_evidence: 「実際に、User-Agentを解析し、OSおよびブラウザの各種情報を取得する実装は、サンプルとして提供される。」

findings.description: The known limitation that switching multiple parsers by purpose within a single process is not yet considered (未検討) is absent from the knowledge file. This is a constraint relevant to advanced usage decisions.
findings.source_evidence: 「1プロセス内で目的別に複数のパーサーを切り替える。」(未検討)
